since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.60%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.31% · BTC +2.75% · Gold +1.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.76%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.60%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.60%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.62%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.97%, ISRG +4.78%, AAPL +4.73%, ADBE +4.46%, ADBE +4.46%. Laggards: TER -12.62%, KLAC -12.00%, CEVA -10.35%, MRVL -9.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.03% at $157.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
